description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a landscaped yard featuring several mature trees, a small swimming pool, and a pergola. The house has a dark, gable-style roof and a prominent front porch with railings and steps leading up to the entrance. The exterior walls are light-colored, contrasting with the dark roof, and the windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern. The backyard includes a deck area with outdoor furniture and direct access to the pool, while the surrounding garden is well-maintained with grass and decorative plants. The overall setting suggests a comfortable suburban home designed for relaxation and outdoor living. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from wood and concrete, with glass windows and metal railings.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, front porch, and landscaped yard featuring a pool, pergola, and mature trees. The exterior is light-colored with simple window arrangements and a spacious deck in the backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with railings, and steps, flanked by trees and a pool visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the porch, side windows, and pergola structure in the garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard deck, pool, and the back facade with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Angled view of the backyard, showing the pool, deck with outdoor furniture, and the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
